name: Producer Tycoon
short_description: In Producer Tycoon you start your career as a novice music producer. Sign contracts and market yourself to gain money and fans. Upgrade your equipment and studio to produce better music. Aim to rank above the top artists
detailed_description:
In Producer Tycoon you start your career as a novice music producer. Sign contracts and market yourself to gain money and fans. Upgrade your equipment and studio to produce better music. Aim to rank above the top artists

Upgrade your studio
After releasing a few hit songs, you can move into a larger studio and buy new equipment. With a new studio and equipment, you will find you dont need to put in as many hours for one song as you used to.

Contracts
You may find yourself needing a few more dollars for that new computer or to pay for rent. Sign a contract with one of 4 record labels and receive a payment. Be careful, some labels will take advantage of you and take large cuts from your future music.

Marketing
Every artist needs to market themselves. Select from social media, ads, or a music video. Select the length of time you want to market for, and watch the new fans role in. Some fans are less loyal then others, so keep up the music quality or you may find they start to leave you.

Features

  • Start your career in your bedroom
  • Design and create music
  • 100+ songs
  • Upgrade equipment
  • Sign contracts with record labels
  • Market your music
  • Unlock Achievements
  • Workshop Support
